title: Resolve, to Direct the Department of Corrections to Study Alternative Methods for Operating County Jails
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Mar 31, 2026
last_house_action: 3/17/2026 - Representative HASENFUS for the Joint Standing Committee on Criminal Justice and Public Safety pursuant to Resolve 2025, chapter 73, section 2 reports that the Resolve be REFERRED to the Committee on CRIMINAL JUSTICE AND PUBLIC SAFETY and printed pursuant to Joint Rule 218. Report was READ and ACCEPTED . The Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on CRIMINAL JUSTICE AND PUBLIC SAFETY Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 3/31/2026 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Representative HASENFUS for the Joint Standing Committee on Criminal Justice and Public Safety pursuant to Resolve 2025, chapter 73, section 2 reports that the Resolve be REFERRED to the Committee on CRIMINAL JUSTICE AND PUBLIC SAFETY and printed pursuant to Joint Rule 218. Report was READ and ACCEPTED . The Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on CRIMINAL JUSTICE AND PUBLIC SAFETY Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Report READ and ACCEPTED , in concurrence. On motion by Senator Beebe-Center of Knox REFERRED to Committee on Criminal Justice and Public Safety, in concurrence.
Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
